system.requirement: Your hawk can aid you while it is aloft.

abilities.description: When you @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.3ff03b51f620ab26]{Undertake an Expedition}, @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.ed490d43a2533506]{Set a Course} or when you @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.703964b8d02355b8]{Resupply} by hunting for small game, add +1.

When you @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.a2d7793b23c17489]{Secure an Advantage} or @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.3f5a834fa3fea5d1]{Gain Ground} +edge using your hawk to harass and distract your foes, add +1 and take +1 momentum on a hit.

When you @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.e6ed148eff82c171]{Face Danger} +wits to detect an approaching threat, or when you @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.2f2ba4090b22a122]{Enter the Fray} +wits against an ambush, add +2.
